title: ERP17 Cloud Solution Product Update - Q2 2026
summary: Major improvements in Accounts, Inventory automation, and role-based dashboard performance for enterprise users.
author: ERP17 Product Team
content: ERP17 Cloud Solution Q2 2026 release introduces several improvements across core modules to help teams work faster with less manual effort.
The Accounts module now offers faster voucher processing and cleaner financial reporting views for finance teams handling high transaction volume.
Inventory workflows have been improved with better automation support, helping businesses reduce repetitive stock actions and improve operational accuracy.
Role-based dashboards now load faster and surface more relevant insights for each department, making day-to-day decision making easier for enterprise users.

title: How ERP17 Reduces Manual Work Across Departments
summary: A practical guide on automating HR, Sales, and reporting workflows using ERP17 integrated modules.
author: ERP17 Operations Desk
content: ERP17 helps reduce manual work by connecting HR, Sales, Accounts, and reporting into a single workflow across the business.
HR teams can automate attendance, leave, and payroll-related tasks so routine processes take less time and generate fewer errors.
Sales teams can manage leads, quotations, orders, and invoicing from one place, improving coordination between teams and reducing duplicate work.
Management can access live reports instantly instead of preparing data manually, which supports faster and more transparent decision making.

title: New Tutorial Series: ERP17 Mobile Operations
summary: Step-by-step learning resources for ESS app, management dashboard app, and customer portal usage.
author: ERP17 Training Team
content: ERP17 has launched a new tutorial series focused on helping users get more value from its mobile-first tools.
The training materials include practical guides for the ESS app, management dashboard app, and customer portal, making adoption easier for both employees and managers.
Each tutorial is designed in a step-by-step format so users can quickly understand navigation, daily workflows, and key actions without long onboarding delays.
This initiative supports faster implementation and helps organizations improve usage consistency across teams.

title: Security & Compliance Bulletin
summary: Latest updates on ERP17 data encryption, backups, access controls, and best practices for secure deployment.
author: ERP17 Security Team
content: ERP17 continues to strengthen platform security with updated practices covering encryption, backups, user permissions, and deployment hygiene.
The latest bulletin highlights better access control planning for teams, helping organizations reduce risk by assigning permissions more accurately.
It also reinforces backup and recovery best practices so customer data remains protected and recoverable during operational incidents.
These updates help businesses align with stronger compliance expectations while maintaining secure day-to-day ERP operations.
